Video.summary: Martha and her friends make three pasta dishes, perfect for dinner or a dinner party.
Video.title: Pasta Night

Video.summary: Martha prepares pot-au-feu, a hearty French one-pot meal of meat and vegetables.
Video.title: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu

Image.alt: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu
A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu
A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu

Video.summary: Martha shares her love of houseplants. Learn all about the most popular and sought after houseplants, topiaries and begonias and how to take care of them.
Video.title: Amazing Houseplants

Video.summary: Succulents are known for their interesting textures. Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.
Video.title: The World of Succulents

Video.summary: Martha visits the annual Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden, with a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.
Video.title: The Incredible World of Orchids

Video.summary: With over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her tips for raising and caring for her flock of chickens. Then, learn the how-to of building a chicken coop.
Video.title: Hens and Chicks

Video.summary: One of the joys of gardening is having beautiful color all year. Bulbs and tubers are at the center of the show because of their beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates egg recipes; Martha visits her chicken coop.
Video.title: How to Properly Cook an Egg

Image.alt: How to Properly Cook an Egg
How to Properly Cook an Egg
How to Properly Cook an Egg

Video.summary: Martha and her friend Monica create a Vietnamese feast.
Video.title: Vietnamese Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha offers a primer on lamb, including techniques for different cuts: butterflied, rolled, and roasted leg of lamb, lamb tagine, lamb kebabs, and seared loin lamb chops
Video.title: Lamb

Video.summary: Martha adapts traditional techniques of bread-baking for the modern kitchen: date flatbreads, fatout bread, coconut mandazi, and eggplant flatbread
Video.title: Breads

Video.summary: Martha spices up everyday side dishes: creamed coconut spinach, eggplant with herbs and yogurt, cauliflower salad with roasted chickpeas, and za'atar smashed potatoes
Video.title: Side Dishes

Video.summary: Eat your vegetables! Martha prepares: spring peas with mint, brown-sugared carrots, sauteed broccoli rabe, roasted acorn squash, corn on the cob, and lemony kale salad
Video.title: Vegetables

Video.summary: Martha makes her favorite jam recipes.
Video.title: The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast

Image.alt: The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast
The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast
The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast

Video.summary: Martha takes shellfish to the next level.
Video.title: Shellfish

Video.summary: Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.
Video.title: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Image.alt: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Video.summary: Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; join Martha while she plants a new garden with almost 200 roses.
Video.title: Everything's Coming Up Roses

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the last flowers of spring. Everything you need to know about hostas. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill; then back to her home in Bedford for a garden club tour.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha shows how to properly plant trees including measuring, fertilizing, and watering; how to start trees from seedlings. Plus, Martha's new maze.
Video.title: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Image.alt: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Video.summary: Martha spotlights conifers, the cone-bearing evergreen trees. Take a tour of Martha's Christmas tree farm; learn how to properly move an established tree.
Video.title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Image.alt: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Video.summary: Martha's vegetable greenhouse allows her to harvest a year-round bounty. Then, how to collect, store, and sow seeds. Plus, Martha makes her green drink.
Video.title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse

Video.summary: Martha shares techniques for baking sweet and savory pies.
Video.title: Embellished Pies

Video.summary: Martha makes steak dinners cooked to perfection.
Video.title: Steak Night

Video.summary: All about eggs! Martha shares her methods for preparing eggs, any style: soft- and hard-boiled eggs, fried eggs, scrambled eggs, omelet, and frittata
Video.title: Eggs

Video.summary: Martha makes three easy, classic sauces: hollandaise, bechamel, beurre blanc, and marinara
Video.title: Sauces

Video.summary: Martha invites Oscar de la Renta co-creative director Laura Kim to her kitchen.
Video.title: Perfect Weekend Breakfast

Video.summary: Martha gets creative with kebabs: pomegranate skirt steak kebabs, lamb kebabs with yogurt-mint sauce, beef, mushroom, and millet kebabs, and saffron-yogurt chicken kebabs
Video.title: Kebab

Video.summary: Martha takes your baking skills to the next level with boulangerie bread recipes.
Video.title: Decorative Breads

Video.summary: Follow Martha as she creates delicious breakfast pastries with an easy-to-prepare yeast dough.
Video.title: Breakfast Pastries

Video.summary: Martha teaches techniques to transform your favorite tarts into showstoppers.
Video.title: Fanciful Tarts

Video.summary: Learn as Martha transforms one cake recipe into three dazzling frosted cakes.
Video.title: Frosted Cakes

Video.summary: Martha shows how cultured dairy products can enhance your baked goods.
Video.title: Cultured Dairy

Video.summary: Martha presents how to add lemon into three delicious recipes.
Video.title: Lemons

Video.summary: Mussels with White Wine and Parsley Quick Cook, Lawn Repair, Lawn Mowing, Planting Brassicas
Video.title: Mussels with White Wine, Lawn Repair

Image.alt: Mussels with White Wine, Lawn Repair
Mussels with White Wine, Lawn Repair
Mussels with White Wine, Lawn Repair

Video.summary: Cookie of the Week: Fig Bar, Strawberry Patch, Crack and Crevice Planting
Video.title: Fig Bars, Crack and Crevice Planting

Image.alt: Fig Bars, Crack and Crevice Planting
Fig Bars, Crack and Crevice Planting
Fig Bars, Crack and Crevice Planting

Video.summary: Tuscan Repast: Tuscan Pici Pasta, Calf's Liver with Bacon and Capers, Tortino (Savory Custard Tart)
Video.title: Tuscan Pici Pasta, Calf's Liver with Bacon

Image.alt: Tuscan Pici Pasta, Calf's Liver with Bacon
Tuscan Pici Pasta, Calf's Liver with Bacon
Tuscan Pici Pasta, Calf's Liver with Bacon

Video.summary: Tribeca (Field Trip): SA Bendheim Glass, Restoration Glass Replacement, Bouley Bakery Pit Stop
Video.title: Soho Tour (Field Trip)

Video.summary: Patroon Salad, Soft-Shell Crabs, Making Violet Posies
Video.title: Patroon Salad, Soft-Shell Crabs

Video.summary: Salvaging Artifacts at Urban Archaeology (Field Trip): Turn of the Century Shower Stall, Urban Archaeology Restoration Workshop; Cookie of the Week: Chinese Fans
Video.title: Salvaging Artifacts at Urban Archaeology

Video.summary: Bobby Flay's Mesa Grill Classics: Roasted Mushrooms with Chilies, Paella, Sangria
Video.title: Bobby Flay's Mesa Grill Recipes

Video.summary: Planting Fields Arboretum State Historic Park in Oyster Bay, New York (Field Trip): Arranging Seasonal Magnolias, Beech Trees, Elm Tree Planting, Do You Know: Cherry Tree
Video.title: Arboretum State Historic Park (Field Trip)
